name: AREthProvidedFieldRemoveConsumer
title: AREthProvidedFieldRemoveConsumer
syntax: long AREthProvidedFieldRemoveConsumer(dword pfHandle, dword remoteIPv4Address, dword remoteUDPPort, dword remoteTCPPort);
description: Removes a consumer from a provided field that has been added by AREthProvidedFieldAddConsumer.

parameters.name: pfHandle
parameters.description: Provided field handle (may be retrieved by AREthGetProvidedObjectHandle)
